MAP STYLE

Mapbox requires token in .env. Google is keyless default.

MAGNITUDE FILTER

DEPTH FILTER (km)

COLOR ENCODING

MAP LEGEND

SEISMIC MAGNITUDE
Major / Megashock (Mw ≥ 7.0)
Moderate / Strong (Mw 5.0 - 6.9)
Minor / Light (Mw < 5.0)
SEISMIC HYPOCENTER DEPTH
Shallow (< 70 km)
Intermediate (70 - 300 km)
Deep (> 300 km)
VOLCANIC ALERT LEVEL
Level 5: Eruption (Violet Plume / Magma)
Level 3-4: High Unrest (Red Plume / Lava)
Level 2: Moderate Unrest (Amber Plume)
Level 0-1: Quiet / Normal (Green Plume)
PDZ Geofence Ring (Danger Zone)
TECTONIC FEATURES
Subduction Trench Boundary
Active Tectonic Fault Line
➔ GPS Plate Velocity Vector

GEOPHYSICAL FOUNDATION MODEL (GFM)

Inference based on HF thinkonward/geophysical-foundation-model, trained on 25,000+ nodes and field precursors. Seismic hazard analysis powered by Torregosa et al. (2002) Philippine seismogenic zone data. Enhanced with Gemma 4 12B for multi-scenario earthquake prediction.
MODEL STATUS: STANDBY (READY)
HF REPO LIKES: --
HF REPO DOWNLOADS: --
COULOMB LOADING: --
PREDICTED FOCUS: --
GFM Attention Matrix
Training Loss Graph

LOCAL LLM PREDICTOR (OLLAMA)

Run local LLM reasoning (Gemma 4 12B recommended) via Ollama to pinpoint tectonic risk zones. Uses Torregosa et al. (2002) attenuation equations for ground motion prediction.

NLP REPORT TRIAGE

RESPONDERS LEADERBOARD

VOLCANIC STATUS

TRAINING SIMULATION

DYNAMIC SEISMIC SIMULATOR

NASA-GRADE PREDICTION ENGINE

MONTE CARLO PSHA + GEMMA 4 12B
1M+ simulations using Torregosa et al. (2002) seismogenic zone data, fault parameters, and attenuation equations. Powered by HuggingFace GFM and Gemma 4 12B for multi-scenario earthquake prediction.
SIMULATION PROGRESS 0%
Data: Torregosa, Sugito & Nojima (2002). "Seismic Hazard and Microzoning of the Philippines." JSCE Structural Engineering, Vol. 19, No. 710/2002. Model: thinkonward/geophysical-foundation-model (HuggingFace) + Gemma 4 12B (Ollama).

CIVIC INFRASTRUCTURE MONITOR

BAYESIAN DL PREDICTION

Monte Carlo Dropout Bayesian Neural Network. Provides uncertainty-quantified predictions with 95% confidence intervals. Based on Gal & Ghahramani (2016) "Dropout as a Bayesian Approximation."
COMPUTATION MC Dropout

LINDOL SAFETY GUIDE

DROP, COVER, HOLD ON!
  • DROP to your hands and knees.
  • COVER your head & neck under a sturdy table.
  • HOLD ON until the shaking stops.
